'''pangobo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:myconanotechnology|myconanotechnology]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ng-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:myconanotechnology|myconanotechnology]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pangobo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pængebeth|pængebeth]] || [[word:pængebej|pængebej]] || [[word:pængebesh|pængebesh]] || [[word:pængebe|pængebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pangongoboth|pangongoboth]] || [[word:pangongoboj|pangongoboj]] || [[word:pangongobosh|pangongobosh]] || [[word:pangongobo|pangongobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pangoboth|pangoboth]] || [[word:pangoboj|pangoboj]] || [[word:pangobosh|pangobosh]] || [[word:pangobo|pangobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pangofboth|pangofboth]] || [[word:pangofboj|pangofboj]] || [[word:pangofbosh|pangofbosh]] || [[word:pangofbof|pangofbof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pangobotho|pangobotho]] || [[word:pangobojo|pangobojo]] || [[word:pangobosho|pangobosho]] || [[word:pangoboko|pangoboko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pangoboth|pangoboth]] || [[word:pangoboj|pangoboj]] || [[word:pangobosh|pangobosh]] || [[word:pangobo|pangobo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pangobothol|pangobothol]] || [[word:pangobojol|pangobojol]] || [[word:pangoboshol|pangoboshol]] || [[word:pangobokol|pangobokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pangobothotho|pangobothotho]] || [[word:pangobojojo|pangobojojo]] || [[word:pangoboshosho|pangoboshosho]] || [[word:pangoboko|pangoboko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pangobothon|pangobothon]] || [[word:pangobojon|pangobojon]] || [[word:pangoboshon|pangoboshon]] || [[word:pangobokon|pangobokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pangobothoro|pangobothoro]] || [[word:pangobojoro|pangobojoro]] || [[word:pangoboshoro|pangoboshoro]] || [[word:pangobokoro|pangobokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
